name: read_code
description: Read the contents of a source code file.

path.description: Path to the source code file to read.

name: write_code
description: Write or overwrite a source code file with the given content.

path.description: Path of the file to write.

name: run_code
description: Execute a source code file or code snippet and return stdout/stderr output.

path.description: Path to the file to execute. Mutually exclusive with 'snippet'.

snippet.description: Inline code snippet to execute. Mutually exclusive with 'path'.

language.description: Programming language for the snippet: 'python', 'javascript', 'bash'. Default 'python'.

name: install_package
description: Install a package or library by name using the appropriate package manager.

name.description: Name of the package to install.

name: search_docs
description: Search documentation for a library, function, or programming concept.

library.description: Optional library name to scope the search.

name: deploy_app
description: Deploy an application to the specified environment.

path.description: Path to the application root directory.

config.description: Optional deployment configuration overrides as key-value pairs.
